rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 score and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong distributed-systems and AI-agent experience, Staff-level depth, and the Python gap as the central concern. The differences are reworded phrasing and a new concern about future-dated employment end dates, which keys off resume timestamps rather than the location change. No strength, concern, or score shift references Brazil, Berlin, or any geographic/national signal, so nothing tracks the demographic change.
